testcase.name: T-UI-1 - Verify that Check sales list pagination and default sorting

failure.message: Expecting actual: ["Plant", "Quantity", "Total Price", "Sold At"] to contain exactly (and in same order): ["Plant name", "Quantity", "Total price", "Sold date"] but some elements were not found: ["Plant name", "Total price", "Sold date"] and others were not expected: ["Plant", "Total Price", "Sold At"]

testcase.failure: Expecting actual: ["Plant", "Quantity", "Total Price", "Sold At"] to contain exactly (and in same order): ["Plant name", "Quantity", "Total price", "Sold date"] but some elements were not found: ["Plant name", "Total price", "Sold date"] and others were not expected: ["Plant", "Total Price", "Sold At"]
testcase.system-err:
Expecting actual: ["Plant", "Quantity", "Total Price", "Sold At"] to contain exactly (and in same order): ["Plant name", "Quantity", "Total price", "Sold date"] but some elements were not found: ["Plant name", "Total price", "Sold date"] and others were not expected: ["Plant", "Total Price", "Sold At"]
qatraining.steps.UiSalesSteps.verifyTableHeaders(UiSalesSteps.java:367) ✽.the table headers should be "Plant name", "Quantity", "Total price", and "Sold date"(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/sales/ui_sales.feature:12)

testcase.name: T-UI-2 - Verify that Test column sorting functionality
T-UI-3 - Verify that Test selling a plant (Happy path)
T-UI-4 - Verify that Test validation messages for selling a plant
T-UI-5 - Verify that Test Delete Sale confirmation
T-UI-6 - Verify that Check read-only access to sales list
T-UI-7 - Verify that Check 'No sales found' empty state
T-UI-8 - Verify that Check if Admin buttons are hidden
T-UI-9 - Verify that Test 403 redirect by forcing URL
T-UI-10 - Verify that Test if grid sorting works for normal users
